steps.title: Find the shared input $c$
steps.content: Since $p$ has slope $7$, write $p(x)=7x+b$. Use $p(3)=23$: $$7(3)+b=23,$$ so $b=2$. Then solve $p(c)=-5$: $$7c+2=-5,$$ so $c=-1$.

steps.title: Find the slope of $t$
steps.content: Now $t(c)=-6$ becomes $t(-1)=-6$, and the other point is $t(4)=34$. The slope of $t$ is $$\frac{34-(-6)}{4-(-1)}=\frac{40}{5}=8.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The slope of $y=t(x)$ is $8$, which matches choice D. The hand calculation agrees: $\dfrac{34-(-6)}{4-(-1)}=\dfrac{40}{5}=8$.
